sql:
/* 
====================================================================
Title: Monthly Trend Collect Redeem
Description: Calculates historical trend month by month.

Example Output:
date_record | user_only_collect | user_collect_and_redeem | total_redeem_points | grand_total_draws
2026-02-01  | 2549              | 299                     | 37600.0             | 0.0
2026-03-01  | 2640              | 386                     | 42730.0             | 0.0
====================================================================
*/
with monthly_dl as ( select user_id::bigint as uid, DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month_date, count(*) as total_lucky_draws from draw_lots group by uid, month_date ), monthly_collect_points as ( select point_id::bigint as cpid, DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month_date, sum(point) as collect_points from transaction_points tp where pointable_type = 'Activity' group by cpid, month_date ), monthly_redeem as ( select point_id::bigint as rid, DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) as month_date, sum(abs(point)) as redeem_points from transaction_points tp where pointable_type = 'Reward' and pointable_id != 9 group by rid, month_date ), p as ( select id::bigint, user_id::bigint as uid from points ), months as ( select distinct month_date from monthly_collect_points union select distinct month_date from monthly_redeem ), monthly_user_stats as ( select m.month_date, p.uid, COALESCE(cp.collect_points, 0) as collect_points, r.redeem_points, COALESCE(dl.total_lucky_draws, 0) as total_lucky_draws from months m cross join p left join monthly_collect_points cp on cp.cpid = p.id and cp.month_date = m.month_date left join monthly_redeem r on r.rid = p.id and r.month_date = m.month_date left join monthly_dl dl on dl.uid = p.uid and dl.month_date = m.month_date where cp.collect_points > 0 or r.redeem_points is not null or dl.total_lucky_draws > 0 ) select TO_CHAR(month_date, 'YYYY-MM-01') as date_record, count(distinct uid) filter (where collect_points >= 1 and redeem_points is null) as user_only_collect, count(distinct uid) filter (where collect_points >= 1 and redeem_points is not null) as user_collect_and_redeem, COALESCE(sum(redeem_points), 0) as total_redeem_points, COALESCE(sum(total_lucky_draws), 0) as grand_total_draws from monthly_user_stats group by month_date order by month_date;
